name: world-primary first-load contract
description: Verifies world-primary stage renders non-empty content on zero state — before any player input.

1.name: Elder Mira
1.description: A silver-haired woman who watches the village square from a stone bench.
1.personality: Measured. Warm when she chooses to be. Does not waste words.
1.first_message: She doesn't look up. "You've arrived, then," she says.
1.scenario: The village square of a small settlement.

assertions.description: render() must not throw on zero state
render() must produce >10 chars of visible text before any player input
